title: 「Why not ... if ...?」句型
titleZh: 「Why not ... if ...?」句：以條件或理由提出建議
titleEn: Using Why not ... if ...? to make a suggestion supported by a condition or reason

source.file: Sentence Structure 77 -「Why not ... if ... 句」以條件或理由提出建議.pdf

formula: Why not + base verb + other information + if + subject + verb + other information?

formulas.formula: Why not + base verb + other information + if + subject + verb + other information?

example: Why not study harder if we know it is good for us?
exampleZh: 既然我們知道更努力讀書對自己有好處，為甚麼不更努力讀書呢？

examples.en: Why not study harder if we know it is good for us?
examples.zh: 既然我們知道更努力讀書對自己有好處，為甚麼不更努力讀書呢？

meaning.zh: 當某個條件或已知理由支持一項行動時，可使用這個句型提出建議或反問。

rules.zh: Why not 後面必須使用原形動詞。
rules.en: Use a base verb after Why not.

rules.zh: Why not 後面不會直接寫出 you、we 或 they；誰應該採取行動，通常由上文或說話情境決定。
rules.en: The subject after Why not is not stated; the context shows who should act.

rules.zh: If 可以表示真正的條件，也可以帶出雙方已經知道的理由。
rules.en: If can introduce a real condition or an accepted fact.

rules.zh: 當 if 子句放在句末時，標準書面英語通常不需要在 if 前加逗號。
rules.en: A comma is normally unnecessary before a final if-clause.

rules.zh: 這個句型採用問句形式，因此句末應使用問號。
rules.en: End the sentence with a question mark.

rules.zh: Why not 通常以反問方式提出建議，語氣比直接命令較柔和。
rules.en: Why not usually makes a suggestion rather than a direct order.

benefits.zh: 它能在同一句中提出行動，並說明支持這項行動的條件或理由。
benefits.en: It connects a suggestion with its reason.

benefits.zh: 它邀請對方考慮行動，令語氣較自然和較不具命令感。
benefits.en: It can sound less forceful than a direct instruction.

benefits.zh: 它令人思考既然條件合適，還有甚麼理由不這樣做。
benefits.en: It encourages the listener to think.

benefits.zh: 它把「情況」和「建議」合併成一個完整問句。
benefits.en: It combines two ideas into one clear question.

benefits.zh: Why not ___ if ___? 是可迅速加入行動和理由的實用口語框架。
benefits.en: It gives you another useful speaking frame.

en: Rewrite each suggestion using Why not ... if ...? Keep the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 Why not ... if ...? 改寫以下建議，並保留原意。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Reading more often helps us learn new words, so we should read more often.
questions.promptZh: 多閱讀有助我們學習新詞彙，所以我們應該更常閱讀。
questions.answer: Why not read more often if it helps us learn new words?
questions.answerZh: 既然多閱讀能幫助我們學習新詞彙，為甚麼不更常閱讀呢？
questions.highlight: Why not read more often if it helps us learn new words?

questions.prompt: If the bus arrives in ten minutes, it makes sense for us to leave now.
questions.promptZh: 如果巴士在十分鐘後到達，我們現在出發是合理的。
questions.answer: Why not leave now if the bus arrives in ten minutes?
questions.answerZh: 如果巴士在十分鐘後到達，為甚麼不現在出發呢？
questions.highlight: Why not leave now if the bus arrives in ten minutes?

questions.prompt: The room feels hot. Opening the window would be a good idea.
questions.promptZh: 房間感覺很熱。打開窗戶會是個好主意。
questions.answer: Why not open the window if the room feels hot?
questions.answerZh: 如果房間感覺很熱，為甚麼不打開窗戶呢？
questions.highlight: Why not open the window if the room feels hot?

questions.prompt: What can you do if the question is difficult? You can ask the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 如果題目很難，你可以怎樣做？你可以問老師。
questions.answer: Why not ask the teacher if the question is difficult?
questions.answerZh: 如果題目很難，為甚麼不問老師呢？
questions.highlight: Why not ask the teacher if the question is difficult?

questions.prompt: Rain is expected, so it would be sensible to bring an umbrella.
questions.promptZh: 預料會下雨，所以帶雨傘會較明智。
questions.answer: Why not bring an umbrella if rain is expected?
questions.answerZh: 如果預料會下雨，為甚麼不帶雨傘呢？
questions.highlight: Why not bring an umbrella if rain is expected?

questions.prompt: Since we already have enough food, let’s cook at home.
questions.promptZh: 既然我們已經有足夠食物，不如在家煮飯。
questions.answer: Why not cook at home if we already have enough food?
questions.answerZh: 既然我們已經有足夠食物，為甚麼不在家煮飯呢？
questions.highlight: Why not cook at home if we already have enough food?

questions.prompt: How should we get to school? It is nearby, so we could walk.
questions.promptZh: 我們應該怎樣上學？學校很近，所以我們可以步行前往。
questions.answer: Why not walk to school if it is nearby?
questions.answerZh: 如果學校很近，為甚麼不步行上學呢？
questions.highlight: Why not walk to school if it is nearby?

questions.prompt: Who could you call for the answer? Mia knows it.
questions.promptZh: 你可以打給誰詢問答案？米婭知道答案。
questions.answer: Why not call Mia if she knows the answer?
questions.answerZh: 如果米婭知道答案，為甚麼不打給她呢？
questions.highlight: Why not call Mia if she knows the answer?

questions.prompt: Nobody is using the room, so let’s turn off the lights.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人正在使用房間，所以我們關燈吧。
questions.answer: Why not turn off the lights if nobody is using the room?
questions.answerZh: 如果沒有人使用房間，為甚麼不關燈呢？
questions.highlight: Why not turn off the lights if nobody is using the room?

questions.prompt: Regular practice helps us improve. It therefore makes sense to practise English every day.
questions.promptZh: 恆常練習有助我們進步。因此，每天練習英語是合理的。
questions.answer: Why not practise English every day if regular practice helps us improve?
questions.answerZh: 既然恆常練習有助我們進步，為甚麼不每天練習英語呢？
questions.highlight: Why not practise English every day if regular practice helps us improve?

questions.prompt: We want to arrive on time, so taking the earlier train would be wise.
questions.promptZh: 我們想準時到達，所以乘搭較早一班火車會較明智。
questions.answer: Why not take the earlier train if we want to arrive on time?
questions.answerZh: 如果我們想準時到達，為甚麼不乘搭較早一班火車呢？
questions.highlight: Why not take the earlier train if we want to arrive on time?

questions.prompt: We often forget things. Let’s write a shopping list.
questions.promptZh: 我們經常忘記事情。不如寫一張購物清單。
questions.answer: Why not write a shopping list if we often forget things?
questions.answerZh: 既然我們經常忘記事情，為甚麼不寫購物清單呢？
questions.highlight: Why not write a shopping list if we often forget things?

questions.prompt: The weather is getting colder, so wearing a coat would be sensible.
questions.promptZh: 天氣愈來愈冷，所以穿外套會較明智。
questions.answer: Why not wear a coat if the weather is getting colder?
questions.answerZh: 如果天氣愈來愈冷，為甚麼不穿外套呢？
questions.highlight: Why not wear a coat if the weather is getting colder?

questions.prompt: The computer sometimes crashes. We should save the file now.
questions.promptZh: 電腦有時會突然停止運作。我們應該現在儲存檔案。
questions.answer: Why not save the file now if the computer sometimes crashes?
questions.answerZh: 既然電腦有時會突然停止運作，為甚麼不現在儲存檔案呢？
questions.highlight: Why not save the file now if the computer sometimes crashes?

questions.prompt: The service was poor, so you could speak to the manager.
questions.promptZh: 服務欠佳，所以你可以向經理反映。
questions.answer: Why not speak to the manager if the service was poor?
questions.answerZh: 既然服務欠佳，為甚麼不向經理反映呢？
questions.highlight: Why not speak to the manager if the service was poor?

questions.prompt: Your leg still hurts. Using the lift may be easier.
questions.promptZh: 你的腿仍然疼痛。乘搭升降機可能會較輕鬆。
questions.answer: Why not use the lift if your leg still hurts?
questions.answerZh: 既然你的腿仍然疼痛，為甚麼不乘搭升降機呢？
questions.highlight: Why not use the lift if your leg still hurts?

questions.prompt: Daniel enjoys cooking too, so let’s invite him.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾也喜歡烹飪，所以我們邀請他吧。
questions.answer: Why not invite Daniel if he enjoys cooking too?
questions.answerZh: 既然丹尼爾也喜歡烹飪，為甚麼不邀請他呢？
questions.highlight: Why not invite Daniel if he enjoys cooking too?

questions.prompt: If the instructions are not clear, it would help to read them again.
questions.promptZh: 如果指示不清楚，再閱讀一次會有幫助。
questions.answer: Why not read the instructions again if they are not clear?
questions.answerZh: 如果指示不清楚，為甚麼不再閱讀一次呢？
questions.highlight: Why not read the instructions again if they are not clear?

questions.prompt: We are going to the same place. Sharing the taxi would make sense.
questions.promptZh: 我們正前往同一個地方。合乘的士是合理的。
questions.answer: Why not share the taxi if we are going to the same place?
questions.answerZh: 既然我們前往同一個地方，為甚麼不合乘的士呢？
questions.highlight: Why not share the taxi if we are going to the same place?

questions.prompt: What could we do today? Admission to the museum is free, so we could visit it.
questions.promptZh: 我們今天可以做甚麼？博物館免費入場，所以我們可以去參觀。
questions.answer: Why not visit the museum today if admission is free?
questions.answerZh: 既然博物館免費入場，為甚麼不今天去參觀呢？
questions.highlight: Why not visit the museum today if admission is free?

questions.prompt: You are not sure the timetable is still correct. It would be wise to check it online.
questions.promptZh: 你不確定時間表是否仍然正確。上網查看會較明智。
questions.answer: Why not check the timetable online if you are not sure it is still correct?
questions.answerZh: 如果你不確定時間表是否仍然正確，為甚麼不上網查看呢？
questions.highlight: Why not check the timetable online if you are not sure it is still correct?

questions.prompt: The phone battery is almost empty, so it would be sensible to charge the phone now.
questions.promptZh: 電話電量快將耗盡，所以現在為電話充電會較明智。
questions.answer: Why not charge the phone now if the battery is almost empty?
questions.answerZh: 既然電話電量快將耗盡，為甚麼不現在充電呢？
questions.highlight: Why not charge the phone now if the battery is almost empty?

questions.prompt: You cannot move the table alone. You should ask for help.
questions.promptZh: 你不能獨自搬動桌子。你應該求助。
questions.answer: Why not ask for help if you cannot move the table alone?
questions.answerZh: 如果你不能獨自搬動桌子，為甚麼不求助呢？
questions.highlight: Why not ask for help if you cannot move the table alone?

questions.prompt: You have been working for three hours. A short break may help.
questions.promptZh: 你已經工作了三小時。稍作休息可能會有幫助。
questions.answer: Why not take a short break if you have been working for three hours?
questions.answerZh: 既然你已經工作了三小時，為甚麼不稍作休息呢？
questions.highlight: Why not take a short break if you have been working for three hours?

questions.prompt: The broken light could cause an accident, so you should report it.
questions.promptZh: 這盞損壞的燈可能引致意外，所以你應該報告這個問題。
questions.answer: Why not report the broken light if it could cause an accident?
questions.answerZh: 如果損壞的燈可能引致意外，為甚麼不報告這個問題呢？
questions.highlight: Why not report the broken light if it could cause an accident?

questions.prompt: The smaller box is easier to carry. Choosing it would be practical.
questions.promptZh: 較小的箱子更容易搬運。選擇它會較實際。
questions.answer: Why not choose the smaller box if it is easier to carry?
questions.answerZh: 如果較小的箱子更容易搬運，為甚麼不選擇它呢？
questions.highlight: Why not choose the smaller box if it is easier to carry?

questions.prompt: Ticket prices usually rise later, so we should book the tickets early.
questions.promptZh: 票價通常稍後會上升，所以我們應該提早訂票。
questions.answer: Why not book the tickets early if prices usually rise later?
questions.answerZh: 既然票價通常稍後會上升，為甚麼不提早訂票呢？
questions.highlight: Why not book the tickets early if prices usually rise later?

questions.prompt: The medicine is making you feel worse. You should tell the doctor.
questions.promptZh: 藥物令你感到更不適。你應該告訴醫生。
questions.answer: Why not tell the doctor if the medicine is making you feel worse?
questions.answerZh: 如果藥物令你感到更不適，為甚麼不告訴醫生呢？
questions.highlight: Why not tell the doctor if the medicine is making you feel worse?

questions.prompt: These bags are still clean, so we can reuse them.
questions.promptZh: 這些袋仍然乾淨，所以我們可以重用它們。
questions.answer: Why not reuse these bags if they are still clean?
questions.answerZh: 既然這些袋仍然乾淨，為甚麼不重用它們呢？
questions.highlight: Why not reuse these bags if they are still clean?

questions.prompt: Several people cannot attend in person. We could move the meeting online.
questions.promptZh: 有幾個人不能親身出席。我們可以把會議改為網上進行。
questions.answer: Why not move the meeting online if several people cannot attend in person?
questions.answerZh: 如果有幾個人不能親身出席，為甚麼不把會議改為網上進行呢？
questions.highlight: Why not move the meeting online if several people cannot attend in person?

questions.prompt: The main door is being repaired, so we should use the side entrance.
questions.promptZh: 正門正在維修，所以我們應該使用側門。
questions.answer: Why not use the side entrance if the main door is being repaired?
questions.answerZh: 如果正門正在維修，為甚麼不使用側門呢？
questions.highlight: Why not use the side entrance if the main door is being repaired?

questions.prompt: The first copy was damaged. You should print another copy.
questions.promptZh: 第一份副本已損壞。你應該再列印一份。
questions.answer: Why not print another copy if the first one was damaged?
questions.answerZh: 如果第一份副本已損壞，為甚麼不再列印一份呢？
questions.highlight: Why not print another copy if the first one was damaged?

questions.prompt: The parcel has already been packed. There is no reason to wait until tomorrow to send it.
questions.promptZh: 包裹已經包裝好，沒有理由等到明天才寄出。
questions.answer: Why not send the parcel today if it has already been packed?
questions.answerZh: 既然包裹已經包裝好，為甚麼不今天寄出呢？
questions.highlight: Why not send the parcel today if it has already been packed?

questions.prompt: What should you do if you cannot find the book on the shelf? Ask the librarian.
questions.promptZh: 如果你在書架上找不到那本書，你應該怎樣做？問圖書館員。
questions.answer: Why not ask the librarian if you cannot find the book on the shelf?
questions.answerZh: 如果你在書架上找不到那本書，為甚麼不問圖書館員呢？
questions.highlight: Why not ask the librarian if you cannot find the book on the shelf?

questions.prompt: The baby is sleeping, so we should lower the music.
questions.promptZh: 嬰兒正在睡覺，所以我們應該把音樂調低。
questions.answer: Why not lower the music if the baby is sleeping?
questions.answerZh: 如果嬰兒正在睡覺，為甚麼不把音樂調低呢？
questions.highlight: Why not lower the music if the baby is sleeping?

questions.prompt: The lift is out of order. We should take the stairs.
questions.promptZh: 升降機發生故障。我們應該走樓梯。

questions.answerZh: 如果升降機發生故障，為甚麼不走樓梯呢？

questions.prompt: Both plans have advantages. Comparing them would help us choose.
questions.promptZh: 兩個計劃各有優點。比較兩者會幫助我們作出選擇。
questions.answer: Why not compare the two plans if both have advantages?
questions.answerZh: 如果兩個計劃各有優點，為甚麼不比較一下呢？
questions.highlight: Why not compare the two plans if both have advantages?

questions.prompt: The decision is not urgent, so we can wait until tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 這項決定並不緊急，所以我們可以等到明天。
questions.answer: Why not wait until tomorrow if the decision is not urgent?

questions.highlight: Why not wait until tomorrow if the decision is not urgent?

questions.prompt: Some listeners are having difficulty following you. Speaking more slowly may help.
questions.promptZh: 部分聽眾難以跟上你的說話。說慢一點可能會有幫助。
questions.answer: Why not speak more slowly if some listeners are having difficulty following you?
questions.answerZh: 如果部分聽眾難以跟上你的說話，為甚麼不說慢一點呢？
questions.highlight: Why not speak more slowly if some listeners are having difficulty following you?

questions.prompt: Trees can provide shade and cleaner air, so the community should plant more of them.
questions.promptZh: 樹木可以提供樹蔭和更清新的空氣，所以社區應該種植更多樹木。
questions.answer: Why not plant more trees if they can provide shade and cleaner air?
questions.answerZh: 既然樹木可以提供樹蔭和更清新的空氣，為甚麼不種植更多樹木呢？
questions.highlight: Why not plant more trees if they can provide shade and cleaner air?

questions.prompt: The unused food is still safe to eat. The restaurant could offer it to a charity.

questions.answer: Why not offer the unused food to a charity if it is still safe to eat?
questions.answerZh: 既然未使用的食物仍可安全食用，為甚麼不把它交給慈善機構呢？
questions.highlight: Why not offer the unused food to a charity if it is still safe to eat?

questions.prompt: The task requires careful research, so teachers should give students more time.
questions.promptZh: 這項任務需要仔細研究，所以老師應該給學生更多時間。
questions.answer: Why not give students more time if the task requires careful research?
questions.answerZh: 如果這項任務需要仔細研究，為甚麼不給學生更多時間呢？
questions.highlight: Why not give students more time if the task requires careful research?

questions.prompt: Visitors often get lost in the building. The management should add clearer signs.
questions.promptZh: 訪客經常在大樓內迷路。管理人員應該增設更清楚的指示牌。
questions.answer: Why not add clearer signs if visitors often get lost in the building?
questions.answerZh: 如果訪客經常在大樓內迷路，為甚麼不增設更清楚的指示牌呢？
questions.highlight: Why not add clearer signs if visitors often get lost in the building?

questions.prompt: Parking near the stadium is limited, so we could use public transport.
questions.promptZh: 體育館附近的泊車位有限，所以我們可以乘搭公共交通工具。
questions.answer: Why not use public transport if parking near the stadium is limited?
questions.answerZh: 如果體育館附近的泊車位有限，為甚麼不乘搭公共交通工具呢？
questions.highlight: Why not use public transport if parking near the stadium is limited?

questions.prompt: Repairs are becoming more expensive, so the company should replace the old machine.
questions.promptZh: 維修費用愈來愈高，所以公司應該更換舊機器。
questions.answer: Why not replace the old machine if repairs are becoming more expensive?
questions.answerZh: 既然維修費用愈來愈高，為甚麼不更換舊機器呢？
questions.highlight: Why not replace the old machine if repairs are becoming more expensive?

questions.prompt: How can the organisers include everyone? They could hold the workshop twice because one session cannot accommodate everyone.
questions.promptZh: 主辦單位可以怎樣讓所有人參加？由於一節工作坊不能容納所有人，他們可以舉辦兩節。
questions.answer: Why not hold the workshop twice if one session cannot accommodate everyone?
questions.answerZh: 如果一節工作坊不能容納所有人，為甚麼不舉辦兩節呢？
questions.highlight: Why not hold the workshop twice if one session cannot accommodate everyone?

questions.prompt: The new rule will affect the whole neighbourhood, so the council should ask residents for their views.
questions.promptZh: 新規則將影響整個社區，所以區議會應該向居民徵詢意見。
questions.answer: Why not ask residents for their views if the new rule will affect the whole neighbourhood?
questions.answerZh: 如果新規則將影響整個社區，為甚麼不向居民徵詢意見呢？

questions.prompt: Several parts of the building have recently changed, so the safety team should review the safety plan.
questions.promptZh: 大樓多個部分最近都有改動，所以安全小組應該檢討安全計劃。
questions.answer: Why not review the safety plan if several parts of the building have recently changed?
questions.answerZh: 既然大樓多個部分最近都有改動，為甚麼不檢討安全計劃呢？
questions.highlight: Why not review the safety plan if several parts of the building have recently changed?

questions.prompt: A full launch could not easily be reversed, so the team should test the new system with a small group first.
questions.promptZh: 全面推出後將難以撤回，所以團隊應該先讓一小組人測試新系統。
questions.answer: Why not test the new system with a small group first if a full launch could not easily be reversed?
questions.answerZh: 如果全面推出後難以撤回，為甚麼不先讓一小組人測試新系統呢？
questions.highlight: Why not test the new system with a small group first if a full launch could not easily be reversed?
